reviews.title: Excellent but hard to find now
reviews.text: I've had one since 2017 and the usb secondary charging port has gone out but it still works. If you close the plug on the back it will float in an emergency. I hope they continue to make this product. I think it's only fault is that it lasts too long.  I got a second one years ago that's still going strong in all regards.
reviews.author: JamesC

reviews.title: Great indoor/outdoor Bluetooth speaker!
reviews.text: This speaker is amazing and can be taken anywhere!
reviews.author: Matt

reviews.title: Bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: I LOVE Braven! The quality it amazing! Everything comes out clear & loud. It has an awesome battery life. The price is decent but it's worth every penny
reviews.author: Reynolds

reviews.title: Perfect for portable for medium size speaker
reviews.text: I love this speaker I always to lower it because it booms. I love this speaker for the beach, pool, shower. I even love it more than my standing tower Bluetooth speaker I am going to invest in a sound bar so I will be using it less in my room and more for when I go on trips or other portable reasons
reviews.author: SportsChick

reviews.title: Excellent Sound!
reviews.text: I purchased this with some doubts as it is not a Bose, but the sound is fantastic, and loud enough to hear in a party environment. It is so compact and lightweight, you can take it anywhere!
reviews.author: Bunny

reviews.title: Perfect bluetooth speaker!
reviews.text: I had bought a couple of other bluetooth speakers that work well for smaller areas only, as the volume didn't get very loud. This one is PERFECT for when I'm grilling out, sitting on the grill island and is the only speaker I need for movie night outside using my projector and large screen. Sound is crisp and clear and gets as loud as I need it to be.
reviews.author: JustMe

reviews.title: One is enough
reviews.text: This speaker works as advertised, although I am still trying to find a way around the Bluetooth "one device at a time" dilemna, since I bought two speakers which "sounded?!?" like a good idea at the time. Ideas?
reviews.author: GT911

reviews.title: Great Battery Life
reviews.text: Use this while playing golf and in the shower. Super sound and battery life! Stays paired from long range.
reviews.author: BPetrock

reviews.title: Bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: I work in a noise truck with no radio, this speaker gives me plenty of volume through out the day and last
reviews.author: printmaster101

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth speaker.
reviews.text: For the money you can't go wrong. Sounds great, plenty loud for boating, beach etc. Mine got rained on and works fine, water isn't an issue. Liked so much I bought 2.
reviews.author: Boss

reviews.title: Great for the money
reviews.text: This speaker was cheaper instore, which was a great surprise. The sound is awesome with deep bass. More than I expected from a portable speaker.
reviews.author: Akott1

reviews.title: Excellent Overall Value
reviews.text:
I used to own a Braven BRV-Pro and was far less than impressed. The touted battery life was not near what they said and the solar charger made no noticeable improvement.

That being said, the Balance is a far better speaker from a battery life and overall design standpoint. I will say that the Pro sounded a touch better, but that pales in comparison to all the positives the Balance offers.
reviews.author: Dano82

reviews.title: Easy to use, sounds great
reviews.text: Device does exactly what it says. Easy to pair with iPhone (what I use it with). Good overall range of tones. Use it mostly in the boat so I like the weather resistant nature and rubber coating. Only thing I would have differently is have a longer connector cable for when I use my iPod without Bluetooth.
reviews.author: Rskcbandit

reviews.title: Aweomse Speaker!
reviews.text: I got this as a gift for my boyfriend for his birthday. He absolutely loved it since its waterproof! This speaker is great for the beach and also kayaking!
reviews.author: Danii

reviews.title: Great waterproof speaker
reviews.text: We use this on our boat and it has great quality sound.
reviews.author: Aurora

reviews.title: Great for Outdoor Use
reviews.text: Bought one for me and bought this a week later to give as a gift for a busy daughter in law with a several pre-teen kids. Besides the long battery life, great sound and ability to charge your phone while using, it was really sturdy and figured it would stand up the kids borrowing mom's wireless speaker. Plus water resistant makes it great for swimming pool or beach trips.
reviews.author: Murf

reviews.title: Speaker worked great at outdoor picnic
reviews.text: I have used this speaker inside and outside. Both have exceeded my expectations. The sound outdoors was awesome. The quality of the speaker is great for the price.
reviews.author: Kelly

reviews.title: It's definitely worth the price
reviews.text: I tested this out in store! Love the quality and found it online through bestbuy for cheaper! I paid $100.03 it retailed for $150 in January 2016. So if you can get it cheaper go for it! Has Bluetooth, Aux cord and even SUPERBASS mode. Love this speaker
reviews.author: jesskadaniels

reviews.title: Fantastic for Outside
reviews.text: I work outside almost every morning and enjoy listening to music via my smart phone; however, quality / volume of sound not that great. So I wanted a basic speaker that would handle the outdoors but didn't cost a lot. Looked at many options and decided to try this one cause of it's durability, positive web reviews, long battery life and it could charge my phone. Hasn't disappointed. Easy to use and sound quality is great. I'm outside using this for hours (4+) in the morning and barely use any of the battery storage, plus my phone stays fully charged. Unexpected plus is it works great on hands free phone calls - my hands get pretty dirty from yard projects.
reviews.author: Murf

reviews.title: Great sound for the money
reviews.text: I got this speaker on sale. Sound rich and bass is good. Best thing about it, is it is waterproo!
reviews.author: Bruce

reviews.title: It's ok
reviews.text: I ordered this Bluetooth because I wanted one for outside purposes. I read good reviews on braven but I wasn't completed impressed it's ok but their are others on the market that are better.
reviews.author: Erica

reviews.title: Amazing Speaker
reviews.text: After seeing this speaker at Target, I looked for it at Best Buy and purchased it online. It's a great product, sound is really good and the color is awesome. I would definitely recommend people to purchase it.
reviews.author: roxy22

reviews.title: Not the color I expected
reviews.text: The sound quality of the speaker is great, but when I had first purchased it the color was not the color pictured on the case of it. I thought it was a darker purple, almost blue, but in reality it's a very vibrant shade of purple. In the end I ended up exchanging it for just a black one.
reviews.author: Meesh

reviews.title: Great Speaker
reviews.text: Amazing sound, easy set up. I like the how long the battery lasted.
reviews.author: vaio710

reviews.title: Love this Speaker
reviews.text: I absolutely love this Bluetooth speaker. the sound quality is amazing. It is compact for the amount of sound it can put out. Great sound with all types of music. I have had many different speakers and this one is by far my favorite.
reviews.author: Runner91

reviews.title: Nice Waterproof Speaker
reviews.text: I purchased this for use on my boat. I wanted something that is waterproof and that has good sound quality. This speaker did both.
reviews.author: Waterboy

reviews.title: Highly Impressed
reviews.text: This product meets and exceeds my expectations. I love that it came with multiple outlet adapters for travel abroad. The quality of the sound is superb, and the boost mode is loud enough to be heard over background noise. The sound distributes itself well, and the fact it's water resistant is a huge plus for me. I can't wait to try it at work tomorrow to see if I can hear it in a manufacturing setting.
reviews.author: Eric

reviews.title: Great charger but!
reviews.text: i bought this speakers cause it has really good reviews and supposed to be really powerful! well it he battery does last really long time around 18 hours and can charge your cell while you play it but the sound quality is not what I was expecting barely has volume with my iPhone via Bluetooth and the bass is almost inexistent!
reviews.author: johnjohn

reviews.title: Cool little speaker
reviews.text: I purchased this on a whim since it was on sale and I had some best buy rewards getting ready to expire. I've been really happy with it, whenever I'm doing something around the house, cleaning, reading, showering, ect, I can sync to this and rock out. It would be great to take to the beach or to the pool since it's waterproof. It puts out decent sound with solid bass. The color is nice and bright so it'd be difficult although not impossible to lose. Finally it's pretty portable, it's about the size of an average paperback so while you can't tuck it into your pocket unless you have JINCO's you can easily put into a backpack or satchel.
reviews.author: WillC

reviews.title: Good speaker
reviews.text: No problems. Connects easily. Good sound. Would recommend.
reviews.author: Gypsy

reviews.title: ENDURANCE IN PRODUCT AND BATTERY LIFE !!!!!
reviews.text: THIS IS A GREAT SPEAKER THAT YOU CAN USE THE WHOLE DAY WITHOUT CHARGINGIT.LAST 18 HOURS , WATERPROOF AND GREAT QUALITY , PLUS YOU CAN CHARGE FROM USB IN THIS DEVICE!!!!!

reviews.title: Amazing speaker
reviews.text: It works great and the set up is easy. I use my speaker everyday and I couldn't be happier with the purchase.

reviews.text: Small compact easy to use and good sound. Price ok

Great speaker! my daughter loves it.
Great sound easy to setup

reviews.title: Great speaker
reviews.text: I bought it for my teenager and she loves it!! :)..

reviews.title: Great Wireless Portable Bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: I like it a lot , it last for more than 2 days without charging it , its water proof. Good sound.Love it.
reviews.author: JHF5

reviews.title: Good not great
reviews.text: Everything is awesome as far as quality goes but it's not as loud as you'd expect out of a 120$ speaker
reviews.author: Eddie

reviews.title: Great features for the price
reviews.text: Great Bluetooth speaker with long lasting battery life between charges. Good sound and bass for the price. Did I mention that the speaker is waterproof as well all for under $100. Just go get one!!
reviews.author: Moe6767

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: And my friend say thanks a lot it's works he say that is easy to connect
reviews.author: Esnapidi

reviews.title: Great Performance and Features
reviews.text: This speaker has a great performance and features for the price. I bought it on sale for a weekend trip to float the Comal River. It has a great sound and very long lasting battery. People kept asking me about it because they could hear loud music, but couldn't see where it was coming from since it is not really big in size. The only negative I have is that it's kind of awkward to mount it somewhere, but some rope and a clip took care of that.
reviews.author: TechCru

reviews.title: Perfect speaker
reviews.text: Get purchase. Loud good quality. Haven't fully tested the charge on it but so far so good.
reviews.author: Jms84

reviews.title: Awesome speaker
reviews.text: Color stands out well. Great sounds and holds a charge well. very happy
reviews.author: elite2015

reviews.title: Good speaker, but perhaps a bit overpriced
reviews.text: It sounds good, plays loud, does not distort at loud volumes, but at 120, its a bit over priced.
reviews.author: Jeremie

reviews.title: Overall great speaker
reviews.text: I bought this to take on a fishing trip to play tunes in the boat. It works fine for this. We also used it in the car to listen to an audio book. Has really nice sound. I wish there was some way to plug into the stereo port and have the protective rubber covering on at the same time - minor nuisance. The sound on this is really very good for its size - got bass definition. The best thing was the amount of time per charge - I charged it fully before the first use. We used it for several hours on two occasions in the boat, then listened to audiobooks for a good 9 hours in the car - and it was still running strong. Very happy about this purchase!
reviews.author: drugdoc

reviews.title: Great buy.
reviews.text: I love the sound quality and the fact that it is waterproof. I use it everyday, indoors and out. I do wish the distance between device and radio had better reach, but I would definitely recommend this product.
reviews.author: CAR76

reviews.title: Solid all-around Portable Bluetooth Speaker
reviews.text: I'm a portable Bluetooth-Aholic and have owned almost 60 Different Portable Bluetooth Speakers the past 3 1/2 Years and although the Braven Balance is NOT the BEST I've owned, I would say it's in the Top 5 or 6 and is a very Balanced and All Around Quality Bluetooth Speaker with Good Sound and Functionality, and a Nice Strong Battery Life.
reviews.author: Lakers32

reviews.title: Big bang for the buck
reviews.text: Didn't want to spend a fortune for a portable/outdoor speaker. The Braven Balance provides ample volume and bass. The long-lasting battery and power output keeps both devices working for hours.
reviews.author: JahDave

reviews.title: Awesome sound and bass
reviews.text: its way better than any bose or bluetooth speaker!!
reviews.author: Andrew11232

reviews.title: Great Sound
reviews.text: I've had it about a month now and I'm very happy with it. It has Great sound, easy to set up and use. Being waterproof is a plus!!

reviews.title: Awesome around the pool
reviews.text: Purchased this to stream music from my phone, while around the pool. It has awesome sound and is very easy to setup and use.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good item simple to use no complicated directions i
reviews.author: Kaleb703

reviews.title: Nice bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: This speaker has really good bass tones, the treble ranges can be clippy at times.
reviews.author: Sarge

reviews.title: Great Sound!
reviews.text: We purchased two Braven portable Bluetooth speakers. Very happy with this product. Love the sound and quality.
reviews.author: Karen

reviews.title: Could not be happier with this
reviews.text: This little thing does exactly what I want it to do. It gives me great sound wherever I use it. i wish I could pair and un-pair easier, but it works great and the sound is -- well, it's not live symphony concert hall sound-- but it's really good. Easily the best choice for the price range.
reviews.author: TimInLA

reviews.title: AMAZING sound!
reviews.text: Bose, step aside. This has up to 18 hours of play time (I actually have yet to run the battery all the way down). And the sound quality is ABSOLUTELY AMAZING.
reviews.author: BissellLover

reviews.title: I wish it had a little more sound
reviews.text: It's nice for a small space I thought it would be a little louder and more base for the price. But it sits on my dresser and it does get used
reviews.author: Shelly

reviews.title: Great Sound
reviews.text:
This portable speaker is great and has great sound quality. I bought it to take on the boat in the summer since it is waterproof.

I also used the phone charging option when the power went out in my house. It quickly charged my phone back up.
reviews.author: LindaK

reviews.title: Waterproof attraction
reviews.text: We wanted to get a gift for a friend who spends a lot of time working in the yard, by he pool, and on the boat. (Oh and loves classical music) this seemed like a good plan. Sound is good, not amazing, but adequate. Like the large easy to see/use buttons
reviews.author: Best

reviews.title: Amazing for offroading
reviews.text: When we purchased this item it was strictly to use with our off-road vehicle. When we purchased this item it was strictly to use with our off-road vehicle. Period insert. Even with our off-road vehicle running at full speed we were still able to hear the speaker clearly without any mumbling. Other speakers were never loud enough for us to use because once you turn them all the way up all of your audio began to get foggy and jumbled together . I would definitely recommend this product to anybody who is looking for a good Bluetooth speaker whether that be for home use or for off Road Ing like we use ours .
reviews.author: bputman

reviews.title: Great water prof radio with awesome range.
reviews.text: The only reasons i didn't give this a five star rating is the quality of sound could be better and a pass through output should be included. For the price it is fantastic.
reviews.author: dlichenstein

reviews.title: Great wireless speaker
reviews.text: Wanted a wireless speaker for outside. This little box exceeds my expectations. The sound is full and rich. We were all surprised at the quality of sound coming out of the speakers. It was even better to know that I got it on sale.
reviews.author: Century

reviews.title: Grest sound. Easy to use.
reviews.text: Very happy with the Braven. Less expensive than others and excellent sound.
reviews.author: Turk

reviews.title: Braven Balance nonfunctional
reviews.text: Braven Balance nonfunctional out of the box would not Bluetooth pair and played static, not music when hard connected with mini audio cable. I returned it and purchased a Sony Portable Bluetooth Speaker Black SRSX55BLK. It paired with my Surface Pro 3 within 5 seconds and had excellent sound. Comparing sound between the two store demo units, the Sony had much more clarity and range, the Braven had more bass but it was muddy and annoyingly reverbatory.
reviews.author: atlga

reviews.title: It is a piece of Art
reviews.text: I am a loyal consumer of this brand. Because it is a reliable product. I have another braven, from 3 years ago and it is still good as new. This new Braven is excellent, long hours of play, over 8 hrs, plus the gorgeous sound.Heavy duty construction and easy setting up with blue tooth. Buy it, you will love it.
reviews.author: Schnooze

reviews.title: Nice speaker
reviews.text:
Speaker has good sound. Filled a room well and lasted all fatty and then some!

Appreciate the durability of the speaker as well
reviews.author: ammarmon

reviews.title: Great for painters
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband who is very hard on devices. He takes it to work and it is dusty and works great
reviews.author: spunkyredhead

reviews.title: Great battery and fair sound
reviews.text: Overall it's ok, great battery life. Sound is fair.

reviews.title: Great Speaker with great Battery Life
reviews.text: We purchased this speaker to cover a variety of activities from camping, to washing cars, to cooking. It has been great overall!

reviews.text: It's an okay speaker the bass and the sound is not to loud but it's still a decent speaker

reviews.text: The best speaker i own yet. i had the firsts bose sounlink compared to the braven advance no competition sounds better the braven advanced
reviews.author: Rafael

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Did a lot of research and when I compared this to the Logitech Bluetooth speakers, this sounded better and was cheaper.
reviews.author: Ryan85

reviews.title: Awesome speaker
reviews.text: Was worried about getting it for the high price. Totally worth it. Great connection options, simple to use, not super light where you can knock it over, and of course great sound. Fun colors too
reviews.author: Kevn

reviews.title: Pretty good for the price!
reviews.text:
Sound quality and build are good. Could handle a little more bass and volume but that's not a deal breaker. I use it when I go play golf, I'll just leave it in the back basket on a mid-low volume and play some tunes. Since it's waterproof I'll take it in the shower with me without worrying about it getting ruined. Nice out by the pool or even tubing down the river (a beloved pastime here in Texas).

The ability to plug USB in the back and charge your device off the unit battery is great. Of course this will reduce the length of charge of the unit, but it's still nice.
reviews.author: Remnate

reviews.title: Great speaker
reviews.text: great speaker for both indoor and outdoor use. It has great sound quality at loud volumes
reviews.author: Allibabba

reviews.title: Best Bluetooth Speaker I Have Heard
reviews.text: This speaker sounds amazing! It sounds much better than the JBL, Beats, UE or Bose speakers that are in this size and it has a smaller price tag. The Braven has excellent base and can get super loud. Also it has a very long battery life and it will pick up my Bluetooth device from pretty far away just like it advertised. The speaker is also waterproof, which was just a bonus not a requirement for me. The colors on the speaker is vibrant, which I love.
reviews.author: KindleBook

reviews.title: Great outdoor speaker
reviews.text: Easy to connect to iphone. With great quality sound.
reviews.author: Sabin

reviews.title: Great Product & Excellent value
reviews.text: Was looking for something that I could use mostly outside around the pool anD at tailgates etc. this product is pretty impressive for the money. It may not be the loudest of these type of products but it definitely makes up for it with the fact that it is very rugged, sound quality in the lows and highs are good, it can charge any device with the built in USB port and is nearly waterproof. Very impressed.
reviews.author: Hmark07

reviews.title: GREAT SPEAKER!
reviews.text: Incredibly happy with this speaker!! Purchased on a whim without listening first because it wasn't on display. Was skeptical because I'd never heard of the brand. Sound quality is excellent!! As good as if not better than the Bose SoundLink Color Bluetooth Speaker except this speaker is waterproof!
reviews.author: HappyBuyer

reviews.title: Best Speaker Performance under $150
reviews.text:
I bought my Braven Speaker on sale for $99 dollars! What an amazing well built water proof speaker with high definition audio to fill a room!
I no longer use my home stereo because in my opinion this speaker is very loud and clear.

reviews.text: The perfect waterproof and rigged speaker for anyone who likes to be outdoors.

reviews.text: We got this speaker for the beach and have loved it! Keep in on the beach cruiser to make the ride even better. Just keep sound down on your phone so the base doesn't buzz.

reviews.title: Floats
reviews.text: Great item. Lasted longer than I expected since I even used it to charge my spare phone battery

reviews.title: Great Speaker... I would buy two.
reviews.text: I bought this speaker to use at work in a noisy kitchen and it sounds great. I would recommend and give this speaker two thumbs up.

reviews.title: Great waterproof bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: Pretty good speaker. May not have the punch of some non-waterproof speakers but great sound none the less. I enjoyed tossing it in the water and not worrying about it getting messed up. When not at the beach or lake, I enjoy using it on my patio or when taking a shower.
reviews.author: Gabe

reviews.title: Great product!
reviews.text: Easy to set up and operate. Great sound and durable construction.

reviews.text: Very useful glad I don't have to worry about it getting wet
reviews.author: Zach

reviews.title: Great Product
reviews.text: Have only had and used this product for a couple of weeks, but so far it has been great, use it in the house, outside washing vehicles, etc. I'm going to use it this weekend camping and will see if it stands up to the 15 hour playtime that it advertises. Overall great product!
reviews.author: mcclain

reviews.title: Great sounding speaker
reviews.text: Bought this speaker to use at cabin. Impressed by the sound quality and deep bass. Wish it was a bit louder, but would still buy again.
reviews.author: StevG

reviews.title: the name alone is rugged
reviews.text: Out of the box the speaker feels tough and looks durable, amazing feautures, loud, great sound, amazing batterylife/ portable battery option! Overall worth!
reviews.author: trusty0cow

reviews.title: Big sound
reviews.text: The sound is very good quality.. lots of sound for a small box.
reviews.author: usedandabused

reviews.title: Great Speaker Great Price
reviews.text: Couldn't be happier with this purchase. The sound quality is incredible. I used this out at the pool with lots of noise from people and the water and was still able to hear my music playing. I love that it's water proof and can charge my phone as well!
reviews.author: JennyG

reviews.title: Good quality for the money
reviews.text:
I have a first gen Braven bluetooth speaker. It actually does have an 18 hour battery life. I have used it at work and it will run through 2 full shifts before it needs to be charged. There are better sounding bluetooth speakers for twice the price, but their battery life is maybe 5 hours. The sound on the Balance is much better than the first gen Braven I have. There are bass speakers on both ends of the Balance. The shape is better than the cylinder shaped ones because it won't roll off the seat in the car or boat. The silicone body helps it stick in one spot. What I really like to use this speaker for besides music is when I am using my phone in the car as my GPS, I use the speaker so I can hear the GPS. It works really well for this purpose.
The only drawback I've found so far is that it doesn't have an easy carry case. I have not had occasion to test the water resistance of this speaker so I cannot speak to that.
reviews.author: Daphne

reviews.title: Great purchase.
reviews.text: The sound is really great for a small speaker! I'm looking forward to blasting it outside and I'm pretty confident I'll enjoy the results. Love the look of the speaker as well. I've had some difficulty with Bluetooth pairing which is why I'm giving 4stars. When I press the button to pair it searches and does not pair. I've been going into my phone manually to pair it which works fine. My phone doesn't have pairing issues with any other device so I can only assume it's the speaker. Not a big deal since I'm going into my phone to select the music anyway. I would totally buy another one of these to keep at work.
reviews.author: SaraJean

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Love my new speaker! And it comes with international adapters for the charger so I can literally take it anywhere!
reviews.author: Slater
